description: You are a Software Release Manager coordinating a rollback from release 8.0.2 to 7.8.5 due to a payment processing regression. Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and manage the coordination effort. In the #release-updates channel, star the 7.8.5 message, react to the 8.0.2 message with the :warning: emoji, and set the announcement to 'NOTICE: Release 8.0.2 rollback in progress. Do not deploy. See #rollback-8-0-2-coordination'. Create a public channel named 'rollback-8-0-2-coordination' with the description 'Coordinating rollback from 8.0.2 to 7
